creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
To me, the behavior is erratic to say the least:

$jobs
$sleep 5000&
$sleep 3000&
$jobs
[1] - Running                 sleep 5000
[2] + Running                 sleep 3000
$jobs | wc -l
       0
$jobs %1
[1] - Running                 sleep 5000
$jobs %1 | wc -l
jobs: No such job: %1
       0
$

^Triage: Adding jilles@ to CC since he has fixed some output issues for builtins before.
